scholar.zh: 中国丝绸博物馆复原团队
scholar.en: China National Silk Museum reconstruction team

summary.zh: 按186号模型复原的滑框式选综机构。
summary.en: A sliding-frame heddle selector reconstructed from model no. 186.

notes.zh: 基准零件采用186号实测0.85×0.26×0.50米外廓；八综和凸轮程序是声明过的展项简化。
notes.en: The base uses model no. 186's measured 0.85 by 0.26 by 0.50 m envelope; eight heddles and the cam program are declared exhibit simplifications.
